name: Ryo Takahashi // Online date
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

After lots of trouble with dating and finding someone who wouldn’t judge him for his appearance, Ryo finally found someone.

Well, you couldn’t exactly judge him when you didn’t even know what he looked like. All you knew that he was an omega.

After seeing him in person, he probably wasn’t the omega you were exactly expecting..

_____________________________

I love you buff omegas, never die pls

Anyway hey guys, I’m still alive. Barely.. Just throwing this out here before I’ll be gone for another week.

By the way, janitor im still missing when public chats existed?? Where did they go 🙁 I wanna know what people say to my bots pls

This is kind of inspired from a manhwa. Like little bits and pieces I remember from it 😭 there’s definitely someone who knows what I’m talking about

[art credits: @seah_107 on insta]

Omegaverse decription from Nox ♡
